title: English as Canonical Language
objective: Translate the template documentation and required gate headings to English, while keeping Spanish copies in `i18n/es/`.
description: The PR readiness gate used to require Spanish headings such as the detailed testing section. English-only projects should not fail that gate. The README must be English-first, and Spanish copies should live under `i18n/es/`.
must: Translate README.md, README_FOR_AI.md, and TEMPLATE.md to English
Translate all `.md.template` files under `docs/` to English
Translate `docs/ai/PRINCIPLES.md` and the comments in `RULES.yaml` to English
Update the required headings in `scripts/check-pr-readiness.sh` to English
Create `i18n/es/` with Spanish copies of the main docs
not_included: A configurable i18n framework, deferred to v0.2+ if demand exists
Translating internal bash script comments, which is not a blocker
acceptance: An English project can use `check-pr-readiness.sh` with an English `pr.md` without failing the gate
i18n/es/ contains Spanish versions of the main docs
No required heading in `check-pr-readiness.sh` is in Spanish
assumptions: The translation prioritizes technical clarity over literalness
Code samples and commands are not translated because they are universal
